title: 🔥宏观压制：流动性仍处风险规避期
body: 市场处于宏观流动性紧缩阶段。BMRI 报 71（RISK_OFF），显示当前资金风险偏好低迷，避险情绪主导市场定价。这种宏观压制限制了BTC的反弹高度，价格短期内将随原油价格波动及美联储降息预期反复磨底。需等待宏观流动性信号明确。中性。风险偏好何时修复？
title_en: 🔥 Macro Suppression: Liquidity Still Stuck in Risk-Off Mode
body_en: The market is in a phase of macro liquidity tightening. The BMRI prints 71 (RISK_OFF), signaling weak risk appetite as risk-aversion dominates pricing. This macro pressure is capping BTC’s upside. In the short term, price action will grind the bottom, tracking crude oil volatility and shifting expectations for Fed rate cuts. We need to wait for clear macro liquidity signals. Neutral. When will risk sentiment recover?
